svg.text: How CloudWatch alarms transition between states and trigger notifications
first data arrives already breaching threshold (rare — no email on initial transition)
EVALUATION PERIOD LOGIC — EC2-CPU-High (threshold 70%, 2 of 2 periods of 5 min)

g.text: If metric stops publishing (instance stopped), alarm stays OK — no false alerts when resources are intentionally shut down.
